markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Megan to the Tavrn/GrowthX content partnership.](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**High-Growth Strategy:** The content strategy, focused on high-SEO-potential case analyses and a medical record retrieval cluster, has driven weekly sessions from near zero to \~400.](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)
  - [**Automated Engine:** GrowthX's "Atlas" engine produces 5 articles/week. A "calibration" sprint built foundational artifacts (personas, tone) that enable direct publishing for \~80% of content, minimizing Tavrn's review burden.](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)
  - [**Immediate Priorities:** Megan will provide the Webflow API key to automate publishing, grant access to Gong recordings to refine content artifacts, and recalibrate the 2026 content roadmap.](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
  - [**New Cadence:** Syncs will shift to a bi-weekly schedule (Thursdays, 10 AM PT) to allow more time for performance data to accumulate between meetings.](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Performance

  - [**Primary Goal:** Build topical authority in medical malpractice and personal injury to signal industry expertise.](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=44.0)
  - [**Key Content Drivers:**](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
      - [**Case Analysis:** Deep dives on high-profile cases (e.g., Starbucks lawsuit) capture high-intent SEO traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=91.0)
      - **Medical Record Retrieval Cluster:** A hub-and-spoke content model that now ranks \#1 for "best medical record retrieval company," with Google using Tavrn's content for its AI Overviews.
  - [**Performance:** Weekly sessions grew from near zero to \~400, a top performer across GrowthX's client base.](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=561.0)

### Content Production Workflow

  - [**"Atlas" Content Engine:** An AI-powered platform for scalable content production.](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
      - [**Human Input:** GrowthX's Content Manager performs SEO analysis and defines topics.](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=1340.0)
      - [**AI Generation:** Atlas drafts articles using LLMs (e.g., EXA) for research, then fact-checks, adds internal links, and applies writing guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
      - [**Human Review:** A Content Manager reviews the final draft for client readiness.](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [**Artifact-Driven Automation:** An 8-week "calibration" sprint created foundational artifacts (personas, tone, GTM strategy) that guide Atlas, enabling direct publishing for \~80% of articles.](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)

### Roadmap & Collaboration

  - [**Content Roadmap:** Managed in Airtable, showing published articles, pipeline, and approvals.](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=634.0)
  - [**Publishing Cadence:** 5 articles/week. The high volume provides more data points to quickly refine the strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [**Team Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
      - [**Matthew Alves-Hill:** Engagement Manager (primary contact).](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
      - [**Content Manager:** Manages the Atlas workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [**Website Optimization:** GrowthX has identified opportunities to improve the website, including blog categorization and the legacy "Request a Demo" CTA.](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matthew:**](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
      - [Grant Megan access to Notion, Airtable, and Looker.](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
      - [Update the recurring sync invite for Megan and Kelly (optional).](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=1996.0)
  - [**Megan:**](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
      - [Provide the Webflow API key to automate publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=522.0)
      - [Grant GrowthX access to Gong recordings to refine content artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)
      - [Review existing content and systems before the next sync.](https://fathom.video/share/_cAz9KrYbDASQRG3ndHQ8FzFqmTFzvwg?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
